rows.name: GATEFORGE_HOSTED_STAGING_ATTESTATION_JSON
rows.source: Generated by hosted strict workflow or operator from hosted-staging-attestation.json.
rows.requiredAction: Optional if the other attestation option is READY; otherwise create /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/GATEFORGE_HOSTED_STAGING_ATTESTATION_JSON from real staging evidence.
rows.validation: At least one attestation file must become READY; then run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check.
rows.uploadPhase: Replace after hosted staging evidence packet exists

rows.name: GATEFORGE_HOSTED_STAGING_ATTESTATION_B64
rows.source: Base64 of hosted-staging-attestation.json after real staging evidence is collected.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/GATEFORGE_HOSTED_STAGING_ATTESTATION_B64 with the real staging value.
rows.validation: At least one attestation file must become READY; then run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check.
rows.uploadPhase: Replace after hosted staging evidence packet exists

rows.name: CONTROL_PLANE_DATABASE_URL
rows.source: Staging Postgres control-plane database URL from the hosting/provider console.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/CONTROL_PLANE_DATABASE_URL with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must be a real staging Postgres URL; then run npm run gateforge:hosted-unblock -- --dry-run.

rows.name: TENANT_DB_ADMIN_URL
rows.source: Staging Postgres admin URL with tenant database create/drop permissions.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/TENANT_DB_ADMIN_URL with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must be a real staging Postgres URL; then run npm run gateforge:hosted-unblock -- --dry-run.

rows.name: TENANT_DB_HOST
rows.source: Staging tenant database host only, without credentials.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/TENANT_DB_HOST with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must be the staging database host only; then run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check.

rows.name: TENANT_CREDENTIAL_ENCRYPTION_KEY
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.

rows.name: INTEGRATION_ENCRYPTION_KEY
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.

rows.name: FNNLR_CRON_SECRET
rows.source: Generated staging-only cron secret from gateforge:scaffold-local-secrets.
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.

rows.name: AUTH_MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY
rows.source: Generated staging-only MFA encryption secret from gateforge:scaffold-local-secrets.
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.

rows.name: FNNLR_AI_TENANT_DAILY_USD_CAP
rows.source: Operator-approved staging AI tenant daily budget cap.
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Must be a numeric staging spend cap; then run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check.

rows.name: FNNLR_AI_GLOBAL_DAILY_USD_CAP
rows.source: Operator-approved staging AI global daily budget cap.
rows.requiredAction: No replacement needed. Keep the file private and upload only through the safe uploader.
rows.validation: Must be a numeric staging spend cap; then run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check.

rows.name: SENTRY_DSN
rows.source: Staging Sentry project DSN or equivalent error alerting DSN.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/SENTRY_DSN with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must point to staging observability/alerting infrastructure; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: UPTIME_HEALTHCHECK_URL
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/UPTIME_HEALTHCHECK_URL with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must point to staging observability/alerting infrastructure; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: ALERT_EMAIL_TO
rows.source: Operations email for staging alert delivery.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/ALERT_EMAIL_TO with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must match the staging transactional email setup; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL
rows.source: Staging alert webhook URL for cron/webhook failure notifications.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must point to staging observability/alerting infrastructure; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: RESEND_API_KEY
rows.source: Resend staging API key or equivalent transactional email provider key.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/RESEND_API_KEY with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.

rows.name: EMAIL_FROM
rows.source: Verified transactional sender address for staging.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/EMAIL_FROM with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must match the staging transactional email setup; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: EMAIL_REPLY_TO
rows.source: Support reply-to mailbox for staging emails.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/EMAIL_REPLY_TO with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Must match the staging transactional email setup; then run hosted strict evidence.

rows.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
rows.source: Staging Anthropic provider key with spend caps enabled.
rows.requiredAction: Replace the placeholder in /tmp/fnnlr-gateforge-secrets/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY with the real staging value.
rows.validation: Run npm run gateforge:local-secret-files-check after replacement.
